tasks.label: Build to IIS
args: $source = '${workspaceFolder}'; $target = 'C:\inetpub\wwwroot'; if ((Resolve-Path $source).Path -eq (Resolve-Path $target).Path) { Write-Error 'Source and target are the same path.'; exit 1 }; robocopy $source $target /MIR /XD .git .vscode /R:2 /W:1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -le 7) { exit 0 } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }
